chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI S.M.A. No. 291 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main petition. 11.02.2019 Mr. Latif-ur-Rehman Khan Survery, advocate for petitioner. ----------- Through the instant petition, Petitioner Aly Alp Ercelawn has prayed for the grant of Succession Certificate in respect of moveable property/asset, details whereof are mentioned in the Schedule of Property attached with the memo of petition, available at page 13, which were left by his deceased father, namely, Muhammad Manzoor Ahmed s/o. Muhammad Saboor, who allegedly died on 11.11.2017 at Karachi, leaving behind the petitioner as his only surviving legal heir. Original Death Certificate of deceased as well as photostat copies of Family Registration Certificate, issued by the NADRA and Account Statement issued by National Investment Trust Limited are also filed at page 7, 11, 17 and 19. Two witnesses, namely, Noman Siddique Khan s/o. Muhammad Siddique Khan and Aslam Siddique Khan s/o. Muhammad Siddique have also filed their respective affidavits and affirmed that there is no other legal heir of the deceased except mentioned above. Their affidavits are also available on record. Notice of this petition was published in Daily “Jang” Karachi dated 25.09.2018; however, none has filed any objection to the grant of Succession Certificate to petitioner, as per the report submitted by the Deputy Registrar (OS) on 11.10.2018. 2 Today petitioner and above named witnesses are present. They affirm the contents of memo of petition and their affidavits and also verify their signatures thereon. Since all the legal formalities/requirements have been fulfilled, there is no impediment in grant of Succession Certificate to petitioner, therefore, the petition is allowed.

They affirm the contents of memo of petition and their affidavits and also verify their signatures thereon. Since all the legal formalities/requirements have been fulfilled, there is no impediment in grant of Succession Certificate to petitioner, therefore, the petition is allowed. The office is directed to issue Succession Certificate in respect of movable property/asset shown in the Schedule of Property, as per rules. J U D G E Athar Zai
